summary: DHH announces price reductions on personal electronics he's selling through his Loud Thinking blog. He reports clearing about half his initial inventory and is now discounting the remaining items including a Sony Vaio laptop, Dreamcast console, Game Boy Advance, mini-disc player, and Panasonic DVD player. This is a brief, transactional post from DHH's early blogging days with no substantive commentary.
key_points: Early personal blog post used as a classifieds listing for personal electronics
Items include a Sony Vaio, Dreamcast, GBA, mini-disc player, and DVD player — a snapshot of early-2000s consumer tech
Prices listed in Danish Kroner (DKR), reflecting DHH's pre-US life in Denmark
money_quotes: My ultra-sleek and slim Sony Vaio can now be had for 11.000 DKR.
I cleared out around half of the items on my initial gadget sale, and now I've reduced the prices on much of the rest to get that out as well.
key_insight: A trivial early-2000s gadget sale post from DHH's personal blog, notable only as an artifact of his pre-Rails Danish blogging days.
